title: SDN268_Testing_EX33_CR21
fullText: SDN 268 Testing Scenario 1: CTRL+C Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 1 Information screen Available task pool Hit Ctrl+C for Sys directed flow Accept oLPN Size type screen Scan Totes Complete picks in Zone 1 and Validate picks are done in order Accept EOPZ message User is returned to Information Screen Verify Task goes to Task Assembled status and User is unassigned from task Scenario 2 : Ctrl+B Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 3 Hit Ctrl+ B for Pass Tote flow Scan Passed Totes for Totes A,B ,C Accept oLPN Size type screen for passed totes master task in Zone 2 Complete picks in Zone 2 Accept EOPZ messages User is returned to Information Screen Verify Task goes to Task Assembled status and User is unassigned from task Scenario 4 : CTRL+T Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 1 Hit Ctrl+C for Sys directed flow Accept oLPN Size type screen Scan Totes Complete a couple picks and hit Ctrl+ T ( End Cluster) Complete picks in Zone 1 Accept EOPZ messages User is returned to Main Menu screen Verify Task goes to Task Assembled status and User is unassigned from task Scenario 5 : CTRL+U Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 2 Hit Ctrl+B for Pass Tote Inclusion Scan Tote A and Tote B Hit Ctrl+ U at Tote C Accept Message Accept oLPN Size type screen Scan Tote C Complete picks in Zone 2 Accept EOPZ messages User is returned to Information Screen Scenario 6 : CTRL+E User Directed Ctrl+E into master task that already has completed picks/shorts Accept Size Type Screen Trigger Invalid Zone message Scan Zone Complete picks in scanned zone Accept EOZ messages Repeat Steps 1-5 until task is complete Scenario 7 : Ctrl+B Final Zone Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 4 Hit Ctrl+ B for Sys directed flow Scan Totes Accept oLPN Size type screen Complete Picks Accept End of Pick Zone messages User is returned to Information screen Scenario 8 : Partial Short not in final Zone Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 1 Hit Ctrl+C for Sys directed flow Accept oLPN Size type screen Scan Totes Partially Complete and Ctrl+D to full short item Validate User receives EOZP message and not Set Aside message Scenario 9 : Full Short not in Final Zone Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 1 Hit Ctrl+C for Sys directed flow Accept oLPN Size type screen Scan Totes Ctrl+D to full short item Validate User receives EOZP message and not Set Aside message Complete rest of picks in Zone 1 for Tote A and B Accept EOPZ messages Verify Task goes to Task Assembled status and User is unassigned from task Scenario 10 : Trigger All CR21 Messages 3315 - Complete Picks for Tote/ oLPN in current zone 3316 – Hit Ctrl+U in Pass Tote flow after scanning at leas one tote 3317 – Scan passed tote in Ctrl+B flow 3318 – Scan tote with picks in later zones 33 19 – Ctrl+B with no Passed Totes 3321 - Ctrl+U without scanning any passed totes 3322 – Scan passed tote with picks belonging to previous zone

chunks.text:
[Document: SDN268_Testing_EX33_CR21]

SDN 268 Testing Scenario 1: CTRL+C Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 1 Information screen Available task pool Hit Ctrl+C for Sys directed flow Accept oLPN Size type screen Scan Totes Complete picks in Zone 1 and Validate picks are done in order Accept EOPZ message User is returned to Information Screen Verify Task goes to Task Assembled status and User is unassigned from task Scenario 2 : Ctrl+B Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 3 Hit Ctrl+ B for Pass Tote flow Scan Passed Totes for Totes A,B ,C Accept oLPN Size type screen for passed totes master task in Zone 2 Complete picks in Zone 2 Accept EOPZ messages User is returned to Information Screen Verify Task goes to Task Assembled status and User is unassigned from task Scenario 4 : CTRL+T Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 1 Hit Ctrl+C for Sys directed flow Accept oLPN Size type screen Scan Totes Complete a couple picks and hit Ctrl+ T ( End Cluster) Complete picks in Zone 1 Accept EOPZ messages User is returned to Main Menu screen Verify Task goes to Task Assembled status and User is unassigned from task Scenario 5 : CTRL+U Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 2 Hit Ctrl+B for Pass Tote Inclusion Scan Tote A and Tote B Hit Ctrl+ U at Tote C Accept Message Accept oLPN Size type screen Scan Tote C Complete picks in Zone 2 Accept EOPZ messages User is returned to Information Screen Scenario 6 : CTRL+E User Directed Ctrl+E into master task that already has completed picks/shorts Accept Size Type Screen Trigger Invalid Zone message Scan Zone Complete picks in scanned zone Accept EOZ messages Repeat Steps 1-5 until task is complete Scenario 7 : Ctrl+B Final Zone Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 4 Hit Ctrl+ B for Sys directed flow Scan Totes Accept oLPN Size type screen Complete Picks Accept End of Pick Zone messages User is returned to Information screen Scenario 8 : Partial Short not in final Zone Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 1 Hit Ctrl+C for Sys directed flow Accept oLPN Size type screen Scan Totes Partially Complete and Ctrl+D to full short item Validate User receives EOZP message and not Set Aside message Scenario 9 : Full Short not in Final Zone Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 1 Hit Ctrl+C for Sys directed flow Accept oLPN Size type screen Scan Totes Ctrl+D to full short item Validate User receives EOZP message and not Set Aside message

[Document: SDN268_Testing_EX33_CR21]

P message and not Set Aside message Scenario 9 : Full Short not in Final Zone Sign into Task Group P33 Ctrl+S and scan location in Zone 1 Hit Ctrl+C for Sys directed flow Accept oLPN Size type screen Scan Totes Ctrl+D to full short item Validate User receives EOZP message and not Set Aside message

Complete rest of picks in Zone 1 for Tote A and B Accept EOPZ messages Verify Task goes to Task Assembled status and User is unassigned from task Scenario 10 : Trigger All CR21 Messages 3315 - Complete Picks for Tote/ oLPN in current zone 3316 – Hit Ctrl+U in Pass Tote flow after scanning at leas one tote 3317 – Scan passed tote in Ctrl+B flow 3318 – Scan tote with picks in later zones 33 19 – Ctrl+B with no Passed Totes 3321 - Ctrl+U without scanning any passed totes 3322 – Scan passed tote with picks belonging to previous zone
